original_query: SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS "DEPTNO", "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "DEPTNO" FROM "EMPNULLABLES") AS "t6" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1 UNION ALL SELECT "ENAME" FROM (SELECT "ENAME", "DEPTNO" FROM "EMPNULLABLES") AS "t9" WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1) AS "t12"
rewritten_query:
SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS "DEPTNO", "ENAME"
FROM "EMPNULLABLES"
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1) AS dummy
WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated redundant UNION ALL of identical subqueries by using a CROSS JOIN with a dummy table to generate two copies of each row
Removed unnecessary nested subqueries that were selecting the same columns
